title: Need More Income? These 4 Dividend Stocks Just Raised Their Payouts Again.
text: Microsoft, Host Hotels & Resorts, Verizon, and Starbucks recently raised their dividends. The raises from Microsoft, Verizon, and Starbucks continued their more than decade-long growth streaks.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Host Hotels (HST) Stock for Now
text: Strong Sunbelt exposure and capital-recycling efforts are likely to support Host Hotels (HST). However, constrained business and group travel demand and high interest rates are concerning.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Call to be Held on November 2, 2023
text: BETHESDA, Md., Sept. 18, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust, will report third quarter 2023 financial results on Wednesday, November 1, 2023, after the market close.

title: Host Hotels (HST) Rewards Investors With a 20% Dividend Raise
text: Host Hotels (HST) raises its dividend payout by 20% to 18 cents per share. Its ability to generate decent cash flows and solid balance sheet position are likely to support the latest hike.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Increased Third Quarter Dividend
text: BETHESDA, Md., Sept. 14, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust, today announced that its board of directors authorized a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per share, a 20% increase over the prior quarter. The dividend is payable on October 16, 2023, to stockholders of record on September 30, 2023.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Publishes 2023 Corporate Responsibility Report
text: BETHESDA, Md., Sept. 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust, released its 2023 Corporate Responsibility (CR) Report, which details the Company's CR program and responsible investment strategy along with its environmental, social and governance (ESG) initiatives, performance, progress and industry-leading accomplishments.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Provides Update on Maui Wildfires and Other Recent Weather Events
text: BETHESDA, Md., Sept. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust, today provided an update regarding the impact of the Maui wildfires and other recent weather events on its hotels and the communities where they operate.
